title: 12cm Dry Foam 6 Sphere (3713)
features: A pack of 6 dry foam spheres.
Each Sphere is 12cm in diameter and used for a variety of floral displays.
Dry Foam is traditionally used with artificial or dried flowers as it doesn't require the foam to retrain moisture.
description: 12cm Dry Foam Sphere/Ball Foam Type: Dry(for artificial flower use) Quantity: 6 Sphere Individual Sphere Size: 12cm (Diameter) This is a popular, top selling, top quality, market leading product for craft & floral work. A labour saving product that saves time and trouble, and most important of all gives you the security of knowing that your flowers are secure and are firmly placed in the design. Ideally used to create a unique Floral Design for all floral arrangements, but can also be used for other arts & craft projects.
